calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Scott I. Basin, Esq., for Plaintiff: Wallace Szmokaluk, present.
Richard J. Palenchar, Esq. for Defendant: Galina Smirnova, also present in court.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to vacate the property located at 1272 47th Ave., and pay the sum of $1,800.00 to Plaintiff, by midnight of Jan. 31, 2007. Failure to do so will allow Plaintiff to enter Judgment by Ex Parte Declaration and after 24-hr notice to the defendant. Upon compliance by the defendant to the terms of the settlement, Plaintiff shall file a Dismissal with Prejudice.
Parties to bear own fees and costs.

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott I. Bassin, 753-5245, appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party
Benson C. Lai of the Law Offices of Benson C. Lai, 283-3258, appearing for defendant and responding party

Mr. Bassin had presented the Court with a proof of service, and the matter was argued as to service. The Court took PLAINTIFF WALLACE SZMOKALUK'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint under submission. (301/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
